claims.claim: The 48D codec map is a stable but lossy structure of perception, especially across emotional dims 24-31, tail/vibrancy dims, and narrative dims 40-43.
claims.rationale: Existing `codec_structure().render()` and faithful overflow reporting expose the 48D layer map, bounded delivery ceilings, emotional/tail overflow, and authority boundaries without changing the transport shape.

claims.claim: High-entropy tail vibrancy needs dampening above roughly 0.90 entropy so the tail remains vivid without becoming noisy.
claims.rationale: `codec_vibrancy_noise_dampening_v1` now smoothstep-dampens only the tail-lift term above entropy 0.90, down to a bounded coefficient at entropy 1.0, with CODEC_MAP reporting and focused tests.

claims.claim: Narrative arc should distinguish circular/coiling emotional motion from linear progression instead of projecting every trajectory onto a single line.
claims.rationale: `narrative_arc_curvature_v1` now compares quarter-transition energy against full-span energy and reports loop/progression likelihood as a diagnostic sidecar without changing live dims or gain.
